description: A retailer is considering a new product and requests a detailed specification sheet.

nodes.task_description: Identify the product the retailer is asking about.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds the product in the catalog.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve the official product specification sheet from the document management system.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent finds the PDF spec sheet.

nodes.task_description: Send the specification sheet to the retailer.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent successfully emails the document to the retailer.
